# viettelidc_ovpc_instance (Data Source)

Look up a ViettelIDC Instance by id.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `availability_zone` (String)
- `cpu` (Number)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `image_id` (String)
- `image_name` (String)
- `ip_address` (String)
- `memory` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `security_group_ids` (List of String)
- `status` (String)
